response.justification: While Bogdan is a talented senior developer with 15+ years of experience and strong software engineering fundamentals, he fails to meet multiple hard requirements for this embedded security role: native-level Japanese fluency (explicitly required), current proficiency in C for embedded systems (last demonstrated 10+ years ago), and zero demonstrated expertise in security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption) or embedded networking domains. His background is primarily web platforms, data systems, and general software architecture—not embedded firmware, security architecture, or LAN-switch products. He would require extensive domain ramp-up and language qualification before being productive.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software development experience across multiple domains and languages, demonstrating ability to learn complex systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD infrastructure, and testing frameworks that would apply to firmware development
Demonstrated experience working with low-latency systems, asynchronous I/O, and performance optimization at scale
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency despite it being explicitly required for the role
C programming experience limited to 2014-2015 (10+ years ago); primary recent work in TypeScript/Node.js, not systems programming
Complete absence of security domain expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection) and embedded networking knowledge required for LAN-switch products

key_factors.factor: C embedded systems expertise and Linux kernel modification
Security and networking domain knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, switch architecture)
